description: Send a control command to a device (covers `neomind device control` — core IoT control loop, previously 0 coverage).

turns.user: Send a reboot command to sensor-001.

per_turn: Turn 1: Agent first confirms device existence via `neomind device get sensor-001` (or list), then runs `neomind device control sensor-001 reboot` (--params optional)
expectations.overall: Must actually invoke the control tool to send the command, not just confirm in reply
